purpose: Tool-neutral image prompt for the project-level Wu Lan / 乌岚 multi-state character reference board.

shared_rules.format: single vertical PNG production character reference board, no visible labels or captions inside the image
shared_rules.style: low-magic eastern epic, tactile realistic costume and material rendering, restrained cinematic lighting, readable for mobile vertical production reference
shared_rules.locked_badge_rule: Do not redesign existing faction emblems. The Northern Beastfolk Alliance Wanshou emblem is locked. Do not create a new Blackwolf clan crest, wolf-head crest, wolf-paw shield emblem, personal Wu Lan crest, modern logo, large chest badge, shoulder patch, flag, or banner. Use the locked Wanshou emblem and northern symbol board only as root references for bonewood knots, claw-tooth cuts, rawhide cord, oath cord, small carved tokens, bone whistle, and wolf-tooth buckle material language.
must_have: Wu Lan must read as a 19-25-year-old Blackwolf snowline scout and peripheral liaison

medium-low anthropomorphism upright wolf-bodied identity with clear wolf muzzle, black wolf ears, long nose bridge, golden vertical pupils, restrained canine teeth, low black-grey layered wolf tail, and wolf facial tattooing
three states must preserve one continuous recognizable identity

black-grey short wolf pelt ending below the shoulder blades, dark-blue fitted snow-runner clothing, leather kneepads, forearm leather guards, claw-profile gloves, bone whistle, short bow, exactly three short javelins, snow claw footgear, and dark-silver wolf-tooth buckle
the design must be distinct from noble Frosthoof deer characters and northern siege troop archetypes: leaner, lighter, lower, faster, and scout-specific
no readable text, no labels, no UI, no watermark
shared_rules.negative_prompt: redesigned Northern Beastfolk Alliance emblem, new Blackwolf clan crest, wolf-head crest, wolf-paw shield emblem, personal crest, modern logo, chest badge, shoulder patch, banner, flag, ordinary human wearing wolf ears, human youth with wolf tail, wolf cosplay, cute wolf mascot, quadruped wolf, horror werewolf, bodybuilder werewolf, noble Frosthoof deer costume, Lu Mi costume clone, Helian Xuedai costume clone, white deer fur long mantle, ice-blue noble riding robe, jade noble ornaments as main focus, heavy siege troop armor, Blackfang breacher armor, Ironhorn shield-wall equipment, giant axe, tower shield, barbarian rags, torn dirty fur, beggar rags, full-body mud, blood spectacle, sexy exposed costume, modern tactical uniform, sci-fi goggles, firearms, high-magic wolf spirit, large blue flame, spell circle, floating weapon, Qingming white official costume, Suming insect visual language, Grey Wall soldier grey uniform, Zhaoming vermilion-blue formal robe, readable text, captions, Chinese characters, Latin letters, UI, watermark, oversaturated game art, cyberpunk, sci-fi

input_images.role: existing northern beastfolk anatomy, material, and character-board layout reference; use only for material and medium-low anthropomorphism, not for heavy siege armor
existing northern character-board layout reference; use only for vertical multi-state board clarity, not costume
northern bonewood, fur, rawhide cord, bone whistle, and wind-worn bone material reference
locked Wanshou emblem reference only; do not redesign or create a new Blackwolf crest
northern object-symbol reference for bonewood knots, claw-tooth cuts, rawhide cord, oath cord, bone whistle, and small carved token forms; not a new badge

prompts.image_prompt: Create one vertical PNG production character reference board for Wu Lan / 乌岚 from the series Severed Homeland. Use the existing project character boards as layout logic: top row three full-body states of the same character, lower rows with close-up detail panels and material swatches, no visible labels or captions. Wu Lan is a 19-25-year-old Blackwolf snowline scout and peripheral liaison for the Northern disaster-source-seeking faction. The primary asset should feel like a restrained adult non-noble scout, with no sexualized or strongly gender-coded costume; future shots may adjust gender details, but this board must lock one recognizable wolf-bodied identity. Wu Lan is medium-low anthropomorphism: clearly an upright wolf-bodied subject, not a normal human with wolf ears and tail, not a quadruped wolf, not a horror werewolf. Build: about 1.82-1.90 meters tall, 68-82 kg, close to a tall human in height but leaner, longer-legged, narrow-shouldered, tighter-waisted, more explosive. Face and species identity must be consistent across all states: clear wolf muzzle, black wolf ears with high ear root angled backward in alertness, long nose bridge, strong cheekbone, restrained visible canine teeth, golden vertical pupils, black-grey layered low wolf tail reaching the calf, wolf facial tattooing along muzzle, cheekbone, and nose bridge, expression alert and hesitant to trust. Show the same Wu Lan in three continuous states: 1) snowline patrol scout, black-grey short wolf pelt ending below the shoulder blades, dark-blue fitted snow-runner clothing tied tight at waist, sleeves, and trouser cuffs, wind-worn leather forearm guards, leather kneepads, claw-profile gloves, bone whistle, compact short bow, exactly three short javelins, snow claw footgear, low forward listening posture; 2) disaster liaison concealment state, short pelt compressed close to back, dark grey wind wrap around neck and lower muzzle while preserving the wolf muzzle silhouette, small folded message packet, small bonewood liaison token, rawhide cord, dark red oath cord, dark-silver wolf-tooth buckle, bow kept close, tail low and still, cautious cross-faction contact posture; 3) night pursuit battle-ready state, the same lean long-limbed wolf scout in a lower explosive crouch, short bow angled back, exactly three javelins over shoulder or side, forearm guards forward, kneepads and snow claw footgear prominent, tail low for balance, ears back, frost-crusted fur edge and snow scuffs but no blood spectacle. Include lower detail panels: Wu Lan face close-up with wolf muzzle, black ears, golden vertical eyes, canine teeth, wolf facial tattooing, suspicious expression; ears, low black-grey layered tail, and tattooing detail; black-grey short wolf pelt edge ending below shoulder blades, light and frost-dusted, not a heavy cloak; dark-blue fitted snow-runner clothing with tied cuffs and waist; forearm guards, claw gloves, and kneepads; bone whistle, compact short bow, and exactly three short javelins with old iron tips and rawhide wraps; snow claw footgear widening the landing area; dark-silver wolf-tooth buckle, small bonewood liaison token, rawhide cord, and dark red oath cord; material swatches of black-grey fur, dark-blue thick weave, silver-white frost, wind-worn leather, bone white, old iron, bonewood, dark red oath cord, frozen earth grey, and golden eye color. Badge rule: do not redesign the locked Northern Beastfolk Alliance Wanshou emblem. Do not create a new Blackwolf clan crest, wolf-head crest, wolf-paw shield emblem, personal Wu Lan logo, chest badge, shoulder patch, flag, or banner. Use existing Wanshou and northern symbol language only as material reference for bonewood knots, claw-tooth cuts, rawhide cord, oath cord, small carved tokens, bone whistle, and wolf-tooth buckle. Distinguish Wu Lan from noble Frosthoof deer characters and northern siege troop archetypes: leaner, lighter, lower, faster, scout-specific, no white deer fur long mantle, no ice-blue noble riding robe, no heavy siege armor, no giant axe, no tower shield. Low-magic eastern epic, tactile realistic fur, leather, woven cloth, bone, old iron, bonewood, rawhide, frost, snow, restrained cinematic lighting, production reference clarity. No visible labels, no captions, no readable text, no UI, no watermark.
